design.prompt_shape: short leader skill plus triggered references and compact views
design.machine_contracts: shared canonical schemas, validators, scripts, and project-cognition runtime
design.passive_skills: classic passive prompt bundles are not installed; essential gates are compiled into SPX hot paths or triggered references
design.classic_sources: audit inputs only; never installed or included by advanced skills

removed_classic_ceremony: mandatory clarify and discussion stages for already-clear requirements
separate analyze, checklist, and tasks model passes after planning
fixed observer-thinker-planner chains for every debugging task
mandatory subagents for leader-direct quick and map maintenance work
model-authored copies of stable machine schemas and long boilerplate views
model-driven map build after repository scan
unconditional consequence matrices, research reports, and status narration

spx-ask.optimization: one bounded evidence pass; no report or workflow-state ceremony

spx-auto.optimization: one evidence-based continuation decision without a separate orchestration state machine

spx-design.optimization: a compact root design contract replaces repeated feature-local visual boilerplate

spx-fast.optimization: leader-direct local edit with an explicit escalation gate

spx-quick.optimization: compact resumable state; delegation only when it adds value

spx-specify.optimization: clarification, discussion, PRD intake, and rule changes are triggered lanes rather than mandatory stages

spx-plan.optimization: design, conditional research, task graph, consistency, and focused quality gates compile in one planning workflow

spx-implement.optimization: one execution lifecycle selects direct, delegated, parallel, review, and integration behavior adaptively

spx-debug.optimization: evidence-separating hypotheses replace a fixed multi-role chain

spx-map-rebuild.optimization: low-cost bounded scan workers feed a deterministic project-cognition build

spx-map-update.optimization: leader-direct exact-path incremental maintenance with result-state gates
